auto_merge.commit_message:
Distinguish between "not found"-type (key/attribute) errors, which are sometimes
unimportant and which we may want to ignore, and "other" errors which usually
do want to be propagated.

The main difference in behaviour is that `BaseException` (e.g. `MemoryError` etc.)
will now be propagated out of `__Pyx_MergeVtables`.
It also means that if a base class has an attribute `__pyx_vtable__` which isn't
a capsule that's now an error that is propagated rather than silently ignored.

repo.description: The most widely used Python to C compiler
repo.name: cython

body:
Distinguish between "not found"-type errors, which are sometimes unimportant and which we may want to ignore, and "other" errors which usually do want to be propagated.

The main difference in behaviour is that `BaseException` (e.g. `MemoryError` etc) will now be propagated out of `__Pyx_MergeVtables`. It also means that if a base class has an attribute `__pyx_vtable__` which isn't a capsule that's now an error that is propagated rather than silently ignored.

comment_data.body: This is certainly better than what's there now, but looking at where the exception originates, we _could_ be more specific and only allow `KeyError` and `AttributeError`.

commit.message:
Improve error handling in GetVtable

Distinguish between "not found"-type errors, which are sometimes
unimportant and which we may want to ignore, and "other" errors
which usually do want to be propagated.

The main difference in behaviour is that `BaseException` (e.g.
`MemoryError` etc) will now be propagated out of `__Pyx_MergeVtables`.
It also means that if a base class has an attribute `__pyx_vtable__`
which isn't a capsule that's now an error that is propagated
rather than silently ignored.

milestone.description:
Main features:
- Pattern matching
- Generics / subscripted container types
- `@cython.collection_type()`
- `restrict`
- more vectorcalls
- more thread safety
- smaller modules, more shared code
- remove Py3.8 support, keep Py3.9+

title: Improve error handling in GetVtable
